Fix SRC-BUG-008 (attempt 1/3): QA: REQ-001 — The requirement REQ-001 specifies 'MCP Response Ti.

Acceptance test gap for REQ-001: MCP Response Time Performance

Reason: The requirement REQ-001 specifies 'MCP Response Time Performance' as a non-functional requirement, but the provided code implements Java and TypeScript parsers for extracting @implements annotations. There is no code related to measuring, monitoring, or enforcing response time performance for MCP endpoints. The code is entirely about code annotation parsing, which is unrelated to the performance requirement.

Severity: high

ACTION: Implement REQ-001 according to the spec.

PROJECT: /Users/dmitry/Documents/Droid/spec-editor2
Read FILES TO CHECK mentioned above before making changes.
Use bash to run: python -m pytest tests/ -q to verify fixes.
